calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Proceedings And For Discharge Of Administrator [Probate Code Sec 12251]
Off Calendar Feb-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for Joyce Tang.

The Court finds pursuant to Probate Code 12407 that Jerry Tang is a missing person who is presumed to be dead and determined under Probate Code 12401 that the date of death is November 28, 2010. The Court approved the petition appointing Joyce Tang as Administrator with full authority (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
